scripts.dev:backend: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'backend'; if (Test-Path '..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe') { ..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8080 } else { python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8080 }"
scripts.dev:t0-worker: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'backend'; if (Test-Path '..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe') { ..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py run_t0_worker } else { python manage.py run_t0_worker }"
scripts.dev:t0-foreign-worker: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'backend'; if (Test-Path '..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe') { ..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py run_t0_foreign_worker } else { python manage.py run_t0_foreign_worker }"
scripts.dev:foreign-worker: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location 'backend'; if (Test-Path '..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe') { ..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py run_foreign_backfill_worker } else { python manage.py run_foreign_backfill_worker }"
